preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Special guests! We will have special guests and not-so-special guests-- you can come, too. So yes! Wednesday Club, we'll be talking about comic books! It's going to be great!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Also, there's a game called For Honor that just came out that a couple of you assholes are in.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it's on the shelves, we've been playing it for weeks here!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You can play it as well if you go to your local shop or download it or get it at a store--I already said that but you can play samurais-- we have no samurais here. You can play knights-- Hey!-- or you can play Vikings-- you can use this guy!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What kind of Viking are you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It comes out Tuesday, February 14th on all gaming platforms.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: No, we had to sit quietly for an hour afterward, just to take it all in.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What kind of Viking are you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It comes out Tuesday, February 14th on all gaming platforms.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's Valentine's Day-- I didn't... miss... (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Our Valentine's Day consisted of me making chili and then us going to Menchie's.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It was a gooood Valentine's Day.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's good chili, to be fair.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You got out of the house, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We watched Jurassic World and Suicide Squad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We wanted to get caught up on our, like--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Certainly. It's been kinda low-key here for the day.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Giant balls. Yeah, his I'm not sure of--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We haven't checked his, to be fair.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, I have called off my associates. The hunt is null and void. You're free to wander without worry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We'll probably only be another day or two in town before we head home. Thank you. Thank you for your time.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Did we not get anything for that?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We got someone to remove a debt upon our heads.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Could we see the debt or was it magic?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Whoa. Glad we did that. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Let the big guy play.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But I wanna keep an eye out on the bar because I still don't trust our environment.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, yeah. The drinks are passed around, some small talk's made with Treev, discussing just how things have been pretty low-key since Asharru was killed and you guys last left, there hasn't been an upset. There was apparently a vision of some sort of a creature at the top of the Cerulean Palace a few days ago.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Whoa. Glad we did that. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Let the big guy play.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But I wanna keep an eye out on the bar because I still don't trust our environment.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Certainly. It's been kinda low-key here for the day.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Then that's two for you. I'll have two of your strongest whatevers for blond-chin over there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Round it is." And he goes and he gathers up a number of small mugs, tankards, it's ramshackle in here. This essentially acts as a base of operations first and a tavern a distant second, so it's barely functional really as a comparable establishment for fine drinks and atmosphere, but it works.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It seems like it's been minted recently, relative in the past maybe ten or so years. It has not seen a lot of antiquing across its surface, and most of the coin is branded in a way that emanates from the Truscan Empire. It does appear to have Wildmount origin.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll reach into my Bag of Holding

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And pull up just a handful of coin.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A nice fistful of pristine platinum pieces in his grip.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just a whole bag of that? I want to look at one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't. Flick. Money at me. Dear. If you want to keep your hands.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You hear the scratching sound of quill on parchment as Doty has arrived behind you and is now currently cataloguing the entire conversation. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm gonna use my gold dice for this. It makes sense.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's not the cup of a carpenter.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You've seen quite a few gold, platinum pieces in your time. This seems fairly legit.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Be pleased." Turns around and walks back up the stairs, the front of the palace, and enters through one of the side doorways. About two, three minutes pass. The guards just keep a view out, and then eventually you see an older woman in familiar ceremonial robes exit from the doorway that the guard went into. This is the Grand Maven, Gameshega, who you met and escorted you up into the palace originally. She walks up with her bracelets still jingling as she steps down the stairs, her long robes trailing behind her a good like two-three feet. Her headdress still has little brass quills that streak down, past her shoulders into her mid-back, and as she steps up: "It is good to see all of you once more. I do not believe we have met, I'm sorry, what is your name?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I thought we got it back, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did he give back to us or did he not?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, no. Are we talking about the flute?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: J'mon's symbol to show to all friends.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think he still has the symbol, doesn't he?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I have his flute because I picked it up last.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that doesn't have his symbol on it though.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We do bring news though, so...

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We are friends to-- the man on top. J'mon, I misspoke.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We need to speak with him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Vox Machina is here, he knows us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And return this  I show the flute. Maybe they'll recognize it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The guard takes the flute and--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I take it and I dust the ash and drug use off of it. And then--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The guard takes it and looks at it, confused. "Please to be patient, for just a moment."

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Technically now that I think about it, it would still be day, because you guys left in the morning to Ank'Harel, and you've been there for a few hours, so it's early afternoon at this point.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow! That was exhilarating! It's like my body fell apart and came back together again!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's exactly what it was like.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Or it was like walking forward.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I've never had that sensation ever before. Ever.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I felt a great force behind me, pushing me forward! And then all of a sudden I opened my eyes and was in a new place. Doty, take this down. Today is the greatest day of Taryon Darrington's life. The day that he experienced the wonder of the gods. That's enough for now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, did you guys hear that? He thinks I'm a god. Doucher!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Douchenozzle, that's right! That's what it was. Sorry, I'm just learning it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay so you immediately take the broom, slam it under, and begin flying at dash speed. It'll still take you a couple rounds to get there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh my God, he is hanging on by a thread.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, where's my-- Who stole my book?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But I need it more than you, you get nothing!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I need to know what Fireball does.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I got it. One-- one, two...

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Where am I on my walk up? Can I hear this going on?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You hear the distant-- As you're walking up towards the front of the castle, you see, suddenly, this blast of multicolored arcane energy just, (shhhh) out from over the castle wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You start running. Through the castle?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: As fast as I can get there-- The way I know to get there the--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Would it be faster to go up-- Broom up and over? Into the courtyard.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You enjoy the time to relax a bit and take another breath of air after this constant pressure that's been pushing you. Next morning comes in as the sun rises, you all come to consciousness, rouse yourselves for breakfast, and whatever the next day ensues. You all begin to gather in the common room of the castle once more.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Because, you know, it occurs to me, I've never given you a full tour of the treasury room, have I?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm grabbing the wine and I'm leaving right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You guys are gonna fuck in the treasury? Oh my god! (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Who has never wanted to have the full Scrooge McDuck? For fuck's sake. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: As we leave, I turn to Grog. And I think about talking to him for just a second, and then I leave the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I owe you for that shit. Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. As the rest of you wind down the evening, drinking, perusing the treasury, reading the various books that are at your disposal--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We do deposit the check at the treasury, by the way, while we're there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You find your evening to a close.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We haven't had the night off in a while.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Ask me, it's been my life for the past year. Writing all this down for a book for all you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Uh, there's Stillben, very very far south.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: But that is still out to the Lucidian Ocean, east. The Ozmit Sea is on the western side of the continent. Emon is the closest port city to head to the Ozmit Sea.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, western. Oh you mean western. Okay well then, hang on. If it's w-- Nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I was about to say, who has the map? You have the map. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 'Cause the Earth Ashari are on the eastern side of the continent. Right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The Earth Ashari are kind of northern, like mid-northern of the continent. They're in the Cliffkeep Mountains.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is a conversation that is happening right now. I'm so amused.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're trying to remember the fake geography--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's in essentially a heavy valley of stone in the center of the Cliffkeep Mountain range. It is far from civilization, it's maybe a few days of heavy mountain-- constant hiking north of where Kraghammer is.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I've only got what I read at home.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's the Terra and the Zephra. Those are the only two you know about. Those are the only two on the continent. The Vesrah you're not too familiar with.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, who else can we talk to?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, I guess I could always go back to the Earth Ashari, or the Air Ashari, and talk to some of those people.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe somebody at the docks in Emon would know?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: She really wants to go to the docks in Emon.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I wanna just pay off that docks comment, really. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know. I guess we could go back and talk to the Earth Ashari. You guys haven't been there yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's go to the Earth Ashari.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's collect our things. What's the temperature like there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Right now, with it being the Season of-

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Together you both see-- You both spend the better part of an hour thumbing through the various drawers and odd boxes and sundries that were left behind in the wake of Scanlan's departure. And at the same time you both come to find that, no, there are-- no illegal substances remain.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can we just skip to the part where you get so frustrated that I haven't got it and you just tell me the answer anyway?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You're a good person. Still don't look at the deck. I'm glad you have our back. Don't do drugs.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What do you think Scanlan did with the rest of those drugs?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What do you mean 'the rest of the drugs'?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, you said he was doing drugs, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, did he just take them with him?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All right, I put the deck away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You guys head up to Scanlan's room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Both you guys make investigation checks.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You've done a lot of brilliant things. That was the most brilliant thing you have ever done.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I am so consistently proud of you.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: They are clad in darkened leathers, furs, and it looks like a lot of the armor and garb here is taken from hunted creatures and animals that have been prepared and tanned, here within the sun-wracked center of this mountain valley. The two to the-- Flanking the central figure appear to be human, male and female, both very short, kind of tossed hair. Then at the center you see what appears to be a surprisingly short, but very stocky and thick, half orc female. As she approaches she has-- the hair is woven back into these thick braids that are pulled into a singular, what looks like a topknot, on the upper back of her skull. Her jaw protrudes a bit, you can see the two lower fangs kinda pushing past the lips.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I loved it, you can do no wrong.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. So as you continue downward, you get maybe a quarter-mile into this walk, still relatively far from the village, before-- And you recognize this. You watch as one of the nearby trenches, (earth moving) shifts up about two feet in stone, and you watch as three figures step out from within the trench and begin walking towards you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Stop-- No, no? These are-- Grog!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: They're sending us to the things we're going to kill.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Everyone, wait for a second. I step forward a second.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You watch as three humanoids approach.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Just a stick. Just a stick. It doesn't do anything.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Very well." They turn around and begin to lead you back towards the outskirts of the city, not directly into Terra itself, but as you approach, and walk past, you can see the ground here-- every ten minutes or so you feel a sudden shift, and a slight quake beneath your feet. The landscape here, the closer you walk to the center of the village, seems to be in this perpetual state of shifting rock. And you watch as different areas kind of collide. Areas of stone kind of (cracking noise), and rocks tumble down. Parts of it break and crack and reform. At one point, as you guys are not maybe 200 feet out from the first major structures, the ground has one major spike. (loud rock slide) And you hear this heavy rolling rumble, and you watch as, maybe 300 feet off from the side, a new pinnacle is formed. Two big plates kind of (crack), jut upward, one kind of coasting over the other and coming to a halt. There is very heavy localized seismic activity as part of the proximity to the rift of the earth elemental plane here. And you watch as three druids come rushing out of the side of the Terra tribe, and as they focus, the rocks (crumbling noises) crumble back down and subside. The central mountain landscape, here, brought back to a momentary beat of peace and quiet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Have you fared well here recently, in the past several months?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We have hunkered down. Our business was to make sure that no more of the Rifts befall the same fate of the Pyrah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Have you talked to Cerkonos or Korren at all?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We have slayed the Chroma Conclave. All the dragons are dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Then this is a time for celebration.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I was wondering if I could speak to Headmaster Patisse.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Perhaps, but what do you wish to speak on?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I am intent on continuing my journey on to the Water Ashari tribe. And I need information from him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To the Vesrah. Very well. I could help you with this information if need be.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I mean it would just be nice to, like, say hi. While I'm here at least.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Everything seems to be fine. We've been intent of care to the rift, and from the word that seems to have passed quickly since your arrival over the past few days, it's come to our attention that Thordak no longer sits in the center of the city of Emon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I stand more in attention, more formal. Good to see you, Patisse, it's been quite some time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I just came to check in after the recent events in the world, make sure everyone was okay.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: -- the surface dirt here is built from constant colliding of stone and rock, and a lot of it has been ground to almost a fine powder in places--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm learning so much already, thank you again.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's-- you're welcome, that's good. That's good. One step at a time.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Vax, you made sure Tary partook of some of the soil here, right? It's an Ashari tradition, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What? Are you asking me if he shit here? What are you talking about?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, no. He has to eat-- did you? Tary, did you manage to get some of the soil in your mouth?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's a custom here you have to eat the dirt of the earth Ashari.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I walk off. I'm not getting part of this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You don't want to be offensive.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Mm-hm. Following the local customs, I took a handful of dirt and shoved it down my fucking throat. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (coughs) You go into an immediate coughing fit as the--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Vesrah, you say? Crazy water folk. Who am I to judge? But yes, six to seven days travel at sea, depending on the weather, of course. Storms are common this time of year, do keep in mind we will be passing north of the Hespit, so be wary of any wandering bandit ships.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, and a robot. An automaton. Can I say automaton?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He doesn't eat, it'll be fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well this has certainly got real interesting, didn't it? All right! So, have we a deal?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, I think that's a fair price.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She is such not a good negotiator. What is going on?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: -- inner working dynamics in this group that you don't know anything about--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: If you'd just wait a bit, all right?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're right, I will be quiet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Fine. You've found yourself a leader, a captain, and a partner." Shakes your hand. "So."

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Right now, it's a little bit past three o'clock in the afternoon.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: --everything stocked, everything it needs, I think we're just reasonable.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I've got a couple canisters of underwater breathing that nobody else has.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And I have the remnants of several bottles of liquor. I'm quite pleased.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I will come stacked with some water-breathing stuff. I think we can do it to eight people for like an hour or something like that?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That'll help in the middle of the ocean.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you think that Raven's Slumber is waterproof?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You imagine the enchantment probably is waterproof.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right. I would hate to-- little baby, mini Trinket in there gets like drowned or something if I'm underwater.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. You don't wanna drop the iPhone in the toilet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: About what time of day is it right now?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Eventually, the ship disembarks, and begins making its way further out into the water, just as the sun begins to set into the slightly orange, purple, and dark blues of the end of daylight. You can see the various lights in Emon come on, especially towards the dock, as the night comes to life. And out the opposite side, the sparse clouds that are scattered in the distance, the ship picks up the winds and pushes with guiding speed out to the southwest, into the depths of the Ozmit Sea. And that's where we'll pick up next session!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: A sea voyage. This is unprecedented.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Doty, take down every word of anyone saying anything ever on this whole trip. This is amazing. I'm so excited.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Doty stops for a second, leans back, and then starts scribbling furiously at anything that he can pick up within earshot.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Tary, staring off into the distance, shat his pants. Crying, into his poo--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, okay, all right, so zing, you got me.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He pulls out of his waistband-- (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: -- and notices the tiny member between his legs.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're smarter than I thought, you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm as smart as you thought I was.
